scripts.all: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
scripts.prepublish:packages: npm run all && cp LICENSE packages/foquery/ && cp LICENSE packages/foquery-react/ && cp LICENSE packages/foquery-dom/
scripts.publish:foquery: npm run prepublish:packages && npm -w foquery publish
scripts.publish:foquery-react: npm run prepublish:packages && npm -w foquery-react publish
scripts.publish:foquery-dom: npm run prepublish:packages && npm -w foquery-dom publish
scripts.publish:all: npm run prepublish:packages && npm -w foquery publish && npm -w foquery-react publish && npm -w foquery-dom publish
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm run prepublish:packages && npm -w foquery publish --dry-run && npm -w foquery-react publish --dry-run && npm -w foquery-dom publish --dry-run
